jazz

Mateus Asato - Live in Singapore

Thu, Aug 20 · 12:00 PM
FOO CHOW HALL
<p data-end="213" data-start="102"><strong data-end="141" data-start="102">🎸 Mateus Asato &ndash; Live in Singapore 🇸🇬</strong><br data-start="141" data-end="144">📍 Foo Chow Hall<br data-start="178" data-end="181">📅 20 August 2026<br data-start="198" data-end="201">🕗 8:00 PM</p><p data-end="574" data-start="215">As part of his highly anticipated <strong data-end="262" data-start="249">Asia tour</strong>, Brazilian guitar virtuoso <strong data-end="306" data-start="290">Mateus Asato</strong> brings his world-class live show to Singapore for one unforgettable night. Widely regarded as one of the most influential guitarists of his generation, Asato has captivated a global audience with his signature blend of soul, precision, and expressive musicality.</p><p data-end="828" data-start="576">Rising to international fame through his viral guitar performances, he has since collaborated with artists including <strong data-end="717" data-start="693">Tori Kelly, Jessie J</strong>, and <strong data-end="737" data-start="723">Bruno Mars</strong>, earning recognition as both a sought-after session musician and a standout solo artist.</p><p data-end="1110" data-start="830">Known for his fluid phrasing and emotive tone, Mateus Asato delivers a live experience that is both technically breathtaking and deeply moving. This Singapore stop offers fans a rare chance to witness his artistry up close, featuring a mix of fan favourites and new material.</p><p data-end="1194" data-start="1112">✨ Don&rsquo;t miss this special night with one of modern guitar&rsquo;s most inspiring voices.</p><p data-end="1194" data-start="1112"><img src="https://tm-prod-event-files-v3.s3.ap-southeast-1.amazonaws.com/4e33672112ef11f1967801117567899b/description/6a1c7eb72bfd11f1915501117567899b.png" style="width: 1047px;" class="fr-fic fr-dib"></p><p data-end="1194" data-start="1112"><img src="https://tm-prod-event-files-v3.s3.ap-southeast-1.amazonaws.com/4e33672112ef11f1967801117567899b/description/736eedc62bfd11f1911101117567899b.png" style="width: 1047px;" class="fr-fic fr-dib"></p>
